standard.setting: home, with companion; self-recorded as TikTok video transmissions
standard.comeup_texture: fast, euphoric, then abrupt total inner silence
standard.peak_texture: oversoul remembrance; Operator/Avatar third-person split; crying but coherent; time-stupidity
standard.afterglow_texture: gratitude, exhaustion; re-entry as 'Megan' at hour 5; visuals still strong, melting into them

weird.entity_hierarchy: THEY (senders) > Operator (non-local vibrational self) > Avatar ('Megan', meat interface); Mama Mushie (backdoor mechanic); fellow burners disguised as weird lumps; cosmic firewall role
weird.visual_frequency: melt-drift punctuated by glitch-stutter; packet-drop word slippage
weird.color_harmonics: teal/magenta complementary interference against burn-orange highlight on near-black

provenance.notes: Indra's Net hexagonal lattice and tetragrammaton geometry flagged from analysis corpus — pending user confirmation as direct perception. Palette derived from Claude Codex artifact.
